     - act3_implications: Implications and future (20%)

3. News Format
   Segments: 5
     - headlines: Quick overview of topics (10%)
     - story1: First main story (30%)
     - story2: Second main story (30%)
     - story3: Third main story (20%)
     - closing: Recap and sign-off (10%)
